mapper.delete: DELETE FROM blacklist WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND blocked_id = #{blockedId}
mapper.select: SELECT b.*, u.nickname AS blocked_nickname FROM blacklist b LEFT JOIN `user` u ON b.blocked_id = u.user_id WHERE b.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY b.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM blacklist WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND blocked_id = #{blockedId}
